description_long: This is a metallic extension ladder with two parallel side rails and evenly spaced horizontal rungs, designed for climbing to elevated heights. The ladder features a robust, industrial appearance with a weathered, gray metallic finish, suggesting it is made primarily of steel or aluminum. At the base, there are stabilizer bars extending outward on both sides, providing additional support and balance during use. The rungs are flat and uniformly spaced, allowing for secure footing. The feet of the ladder appear to have anti-slip caps, enhancing safety on various surfaces. This ladder is suitable for use in urban environments such as construction sites, garages, or for maintenance work on buildings.
description: A sturdy, metallic extension ladder with stabilizer bars and anti-slip feet, finished in a weathered gray. It features evenly spaced rungs and is designed for safe climbing in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the ladder, all rungs, and the stabilizer bars at the base.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thin, flat structure of the ladder and the depth of the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rungs and stabilizer bars from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the ladder's slim profile and the stabilizer bar extensions.
